TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ye-se-buS-ta-lin, title = Ye-se-buS-ta-lin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ye-se-buS-ta-lin} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ye-se-bu.Wi-sa-li-aw-now-wi-ci.S-ta-lin " kamu nu E "–ė–ĺŐĀ—Ā–ł—Ą, Low-maay, Iosif Vissarionovich Stalin, pangiha, "(…™'os ≤…™f v ≤…™s…ôr ≤…™'on…ôv ≤…™tÕ°…ē 'stal ≤…™n) , Cong-kow ta-lu nisilitan Ye-se-bu.Wi-sa-li-aw-now-wi-ci.S-ta-lin, Si-yang-kang nisulitan Ye-se-bu.Wi-sa-li-aw-now-wi-ci.S-ta-lin, 1878 a mihca 12 a bulad 18 a demiad-1953 a mihca 3 a bulad 5 a demiad", uyaan a ngangan ci Ye-se-bu.Pey-sa-li-aw-li-ni-s.ce.-Cu-cya-sen-wi-li "kamu nu Cyaw-ce-ya . niyul a sulit Ioseb Besarionis dze Jughashvili) ,ÁĺÖť¶¨ŚĆĖ:Iosif Vissarionovich Stalin,Áôľťü≥:(…™'os ≤…™f v ≤…™s…ôr ≤…™'on…ôv ≤…™tÕ°…ē 'stal ≤…™n) , ,ŤĹČŚĮę:Ioseb Besarionis dze Jughashvili) nilaculan Su-lin cen-ce a tademaw, cen-ce-li-lun-cyw, ke-min-cye, nu Su-lyen nipatucekan nu hulic tu saka tulu a kasitungus "tatengaay sa sakatusa" satalakaway nu mikeliday a tademaw, makay 1924 a mihcaan mikawaw tu cen-ce-katukh 1953 a mihcaan mapatay.nau lyen-mung-kong-can-tang "Pu-al-sen-ke" cong-yang-wiyen-huy-su-ci, Su-lin nu tatuuday wiyenhuy "zikuz sumad han panganngan Su-lyen-pu-cang-huy-l" cusi "u sipunu'ay nu cen-hu", Su-lyen-kow-bang-wiy-yen-huy-cusi, sakaytusa a bataan lasubu a mihcaanay a Su-lyen atu mutesek ku kalilid nu kitakit. . Ye-se-bu.Wi-sa-li-aw-now-wi-ci.Cu-cya-sen-wi-li lecuh i E-low-s-ti-kow a Kow-ke-li, Pahezek namicudad i Ti-bow-li-s a sen-sye-yen. mala sazikuzay nu mizatengan ni Ma-ke-s, micumud tu E-kow syakay min-cu-kung-tang, micukel ciniza tu Lye-lin a Pu-al-sen-wi-ke-pay-pye, misakaput tu 1907 a mihcaan tu Ti-bow-li-s mialaw tu gingku a kawaw sapisuped tu sakalalais a kulisiw. . 1913 a mihcaan malingatu micukaymas tu sapisulit tu ngangan "Se-ta-lin" "–°—ā–įŐĀ–Ľ–ł–Ĺ". 1917 a mihcaan E-kow 10 a bulad makazemec tu lalais, zikuz ci Pu-al-sen-wi-ke-pay-pye, S-ta-lin sakay tu pitu a tademawan nu cen-ce a tademawan a cacay. S-ta-lin I Su-lyen patizeng zikuz, mala Su-kung pulung nu misulitay tu cudad. 1913 . masakapahay a nikauzip Ye-se-bu.Wi-sa-li-aw-now-wi-ci.Cu-cya-sen-wi-li a tuas makayzaay Ti-pi-li-si capi nu ci-ci-Li-low a niyazu', u ngangasawan taneng a mikilim tu baki a wamaan Ca-ca, ayaw iluciluc kasa dayday nu A-sa-ci-A-ni kakitaan nu malukay a tubang. Ca-ca kinapina milihiza tu kalalebu, milaliw, malabades nu pisaybang atu liyaw ku liyaw a malubu, sazikuzay tahkal mulaliw tu lala' nu kakitaan, siacawa siwawa tu. . Ye-se-bu a baki ci Wa-now, lihalay sa amauzip tu nikauzipan. tatusa ku tatamaan a wawa ni Wa-now, ci Ke-aw-al-ci-atu- ci Wi-sa-li-ang "Pi-sow". ci Ke-aw-al-ci cayay ku iluc, ci Pi-sow u wama ni Ye-se-bu. Pi-sow Lecuh I 1850 a mihcaan , 1861 a mihcaan E-kow Sa hunngti ci Ya-li-san-ta 2 ase pahulak tu amin nu kasa dayda nu malukay a tubang, pasayza naayaway silala'ay a patang micakay tu adidi' a lala'. ci Ke-aw-al-ci atu ciWisa-li-ang "pye-so" salikaka i 1870 a mihcaan miales tu nu malukay a nikauzip, tayza i Ke-li mauzip. 1874 a mihcaan pye-so i cabay a luma' palabang makatineng tu Cya-mu-pa-al-su-lye a niyazu' 16 ku mihcaan ni Cay-cay " Yde-ka-cye-lin-na.Ke-aw-al-ci-ye-bu-na.Ke-la-ce". matabal mapatay ku wama ni Kay-kay. 874 a mihcaan tu sazikuzay uheni I Ke-li a kiwaki malaacawa. Ci Pye-sow kilul tu nu kusi aniciwbungan a tuud eneng sa i panan mikudepu tu kucu,ci Key-key miida tu pikuepu mibaca' pawali tu zikuz tu sapiedap tu sakauzip, sakakaay tusa a tatamaan a wawa ci Mi-ha-I atu ci Ke-aw-al-ci, nika dadawa mapatay. Ye-se-bu-lecuh I E-low-s-ti-kow Ti-pi-li sapit a kuwan satip nu Ke-li-a niyazu' "ayzaay a Cyaw-ce-ya-sen-ta.Ka-te-li-cow‚ÄĒsow-bu", saka tulu i luma'. saayaway na u kakitaan ku wama niza, yadah ku nu uzipay a kusi, nika haliepah zuma hina mitii', patay sa miti'i tu acawa u wawa. namahiza caay tu kakapah ku zaysang labu nu luma', kinapina mikilul tu wana mabulaw ciniza. 1907 a mihca 6 a bulad 26 a mihcaan, ciniza atu caculculan i Ti-pi-li-si a tuse labu nu pabinawlan misamamaw tu miadingay nu patayzaay i gingku a sakaput. i kakuwangan, sisangaan a abet mapung mapatay ku 40 a tademaw, ciniza atu caculculan miubi miala tu 25 mang a lu-pu ku kalisiw, caay pisubelid tu cacacay a kalisiwan, hamin han a pabeli tu masakaputay. nika itawya ci Mung-sen-wi-ke misakaku mikelid tu way-kaw-cye-so-tang a sakaput hinisa mialaw tu gingku tungus u la'cusay a waway, palasawad hantu tu tang ci S-ta-lin. namahiza S-ta-lin a acawa pihaceng tu ku imelang, uyza mapaales tu tang nayay tu ku lipida, caay kaanub tu makayzaay yadahay a kulisiw, nayi' ku kalisiw sapingaay tu imelang nu acawa, zikjuz i 1907 a mihca 12 a bulad zayhan sipenu' sulalisan mapatay. i kalaluman niza pinaay tu a buladan zikuz, u wawa ci Ya-ke-bu pabelien ku wina nu uzip pahabay. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == j…ô-s…ô-bu.wi-sa-r~…ĺi-aw-now-wi- ¶i.s-ta-r~…ĺin " kamu nu …ô "******, r~…ĺow-maaj, iosif *issariono*i ¶ńß star~…ĺin, paŇčińßa, "(* Ē~ °os**f ***s…ôr** Ē~ °on…ô***t** Ē~ °star~…ĺ**n) , ¶oŇč-kow ta-r~…ĺu nisir~…ĺitan j…ô-s…ô-bu.wi-sa-r~…ĺi-aw-now-wi- ¶i.s-ta-r~…ĺin, si-jaŇč-kaŇč nisur~…ĺitan j…ô-s…ô-bu.wi-sa-r~…ĺi-aw-now-wi- ¶i.s-ta-r~…ĺin, **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad-**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad", ujaan a ŇčaŇčan ¶i j…ô-s…ô-bu.p…ô-sa-r~…ĺi-aw-r~…ĺi-ni-s. ¶…ô.- ¶u- ¶ja-s…ôn-wi-r~…ĺi "kamu nu ¶jaw- ¶…ô-ja . nijur~…ĺ a sur~…ĺit ios…ôb b…ôsarionis dz…ô *ugńßasńß*ir~…ĺi) ,***:iosif *issariono*i ¶ńß star~…ĺin,**:(* Ē~ °os**f ***s…ôr** Ē~ °on…ô***t** Ē~ °star~…ĺ**n) , ,**:ios…ôb b…ôsarionis dz…ô *ugńßasńß*ir~…ĺi) nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan su-r~…ĺin ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a tad…ômaw, ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺun- ¶jw, k…ô-min- ¶j…ô, nu su-r~…ĺj…ôn nipatu ¶…ôkan nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ tu saka tur~…ĺu a kasituŇčus "tat…ôŇčaaj sa sakatusa" satar~…ĺakawaj nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw, makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mikawaw tu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô-katukńß **** a mińß ¶aan mapataj.nau r~…ĺj…ôn-muŇč-koŇč- ¶an-taŇč "pu-ar~…ĺ-s…ôn-k…ô" ¶oŇč-jaŇč-wij…ôn-ńßuj-su- ¶i, su-r~…ĺin nu tatuudaj wij…ônńßuj "zikuz sumad ńßan paŇčanŇčan su-r~…ĺj…ôn-pu- ¶aŇč-ńßuj-r~…ĺ" ¶usi "u sipunu Ē~ °aj nu ¶…ôn-ńßu", su-r~…ĺj…ôn-kow-baŇč-wij-j…ôn-ńßuj- ¶usi, sakajtusa a bataan r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aanaj a su-r~…ĺj…ôn atu mut…ôs…ôk ku kar~…ĺir~…ĺid nu kitakit. . j…ô-s…ô-bu.wi-sa-r~…ĺi-aw-now-wi- ¶i. ¶u- ¶ja-s…ôn-wi-r~…ĺi r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i …ô-r~…ĺow-s-ti-kow a kow-k…ô-r~…ĺi, pańß…ôz…ôk nami ¶udad i ti-bow-r~…ĺi-s a s…ôn-sj…ô-j…ôn. mar~…ĺa sazikuzaj nu mizat…ôŇčan ni ma-k…ô-s, mi ¶umud tu …ô-kow sjakaj min- ¶u-kuŇč-taŇč, mi ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ ¶iniza tu r~…ĺj…ô-r~…ĺin a pu-ar~…ĺ-s…ôn-wi-k…ô-paj-pj…ô, misakaput tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu ti-bow-r~…ĺi-s miar~…ĺaw tu giŇčku a kawaw sapisup…ôd tu sakar~…ĺar~…ĺais a kur~…ĺisiw. . **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mi ¶ukajmas tu sapisur~…ĺit tu ŇčaŇčan "s…ô-ta-r~…ĺin" "*******". **** a mińß ¶aan …ô-kow ** a bur~…ĺad makaz…ôm…ô ¶ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺais, zikuz ¶i pu-ar~…ĺ-s…ôn-wi-k…ô-paj-pj…ô, s-ta-r~…ĺin sakaj tu pitu a tad…ômawan nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a tad…ômawan a ¶a ¶aj. s-ta-r~…ĺin i su-r~…ĺj…ôn patiz…ôŇč zikuz, mar~…ĺa su-kuŇč pur~…ĺuŇč nu misur~…ĺitaj tu ¶udad. **** . masakapańßaj a nikauzip j…ô-s…ô-bu.wi-sa-r~…ĺi-aw-now-wi- ¶i. ¶u- ¶ja-s…ôn-wi-r~…ĺi a Ē~ ° nu kakitaan, sia ¶awa siwawa tu. . j…ô-s…ô-bu a baki ¶i wa-now, r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj sa amauzip tu nikauzipan. tatusa ku tatamaan a wawa ni wa-now, ¶i k…ô-aw-ar~…ĺ- ¶i-atu- ¶i wi-sa-r~…ĺi-aŇč "pi-sow". ¶i k…ô-aw-ar~…ĺ- ¶i ¶ajaj ku ir~…ĺu ¶, ¶i pi-sow u wama ni j…ô-s…ô-bu. pi-sow r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i **** a mińß ¶aan , **** a mińß ¶aan …ô-kow sa ńßunŇčti ¶i ja-r~…ĺi-san-ta * as…ô pańßur~…ĺak tu amin nu kasa dajda nu mar~…ĺukaj a tubaŇč, pasajza naajawaj sir~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °aj a pataŇč mi ¶akaj tu adidi Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. ¶i k…ô-aw-ar~…ĺ- ¶i atu ¶iwisa-r~…ĺi-aŇč "pj…ô-so" sar~…ĺikaka i **** a mińß ¶aan miar~…ĺ…ôs tu nu mar~…ĺukaj a nikauzip, tajza i k…ô-r~…ĺi mauzip. **** a mińß ¶aan pj…ô-so i ¶abaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° par~…ĺabaŇč makatin…ôŇč tu ¶ja-mu-pa-ar~…ĺ-su-r~…ĺj…ô a nijazu Ē~ ° ** ku mińß ¶aan ni pj…ô-sow kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu nu kusi ani ¶iwbuŇčan a tuud …ôn…ôŇč sa i panan mikud…ôpu tu ku ¶u, ¶i k…ô-k…ô miida tu piku…ôpu miba ¶a Ē~ ° pawar~…ĺi tu zikuz tu sapi…ôdap tu sakauzip, sakakaaj tusa a tatamaan a wawa ¶i mi-ńßa-i atu ¶i k…ô-aw-ar~…ĺ- ¶i, nika dadawa mapataj. j…ô-s…ô-bu-r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i …ô-r~…ĺow-s-ti-kow ti-pi-r~…ĺi sapit a kuwan satip nu k…ô-r~…ĺi-a nijazu Ē~ ° "ajzaaj a ¶jaw- ¶…ô-ja-s…ôn-ta.ka-t…ô-r~…ĺi- ¶ow*sow-bu", saka tur~…ĺu i r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. saajawaj na u kakitaan ku wama niza, jadańß ku nu uzipaj a kusi, nika ńßar~…ĺi…ôpańß zuma ńßina mitii Ē~ °, pataj sa miti Ē~ °i tu a ¶awa u wawa. namańßiza ¶aaj tu kakapańß ku zajsaŇč r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, kinapina mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu wana mabur~…ĺaw ¶iniza. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a mińß ¶aan, ¶iniza atu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺan i ti-pi-r~…ĺi-si a tus…ô r~…ĺabu nu pabinawr~…ĺan misamamaw tu miadiŇčaj nu patajzaaj i giŇčku a sakaput. i kakuwaŇčan, sisaŇčaan a ab…ôt mapuŇč mapataj ku ** a tad…ômaw, ¶iniza atu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺan miubi miar~…ĺa tu ** maŇč a r~…ĺu-pu ku kar~…ĺisiw, ¶aaj pisub…ôr~…ĺid tu ¶a ¶a ¶aj a kar~…ĺisiwan, ńßamin ńßan a pab…ôr~…ĺi tu masakaputaj. nika itawja ¶i muŇč-s…ôn-wi-k…ô misakaku mik…ôr~…ĺid tu waj-kaw- ¶j…ô-so-taŇč a sakaput ńßinisa miar~…ĺaw tu giŇčku tuŇčus u r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a wawaj, par~…ĺasawad ńßantu tu taŇč ¶i s-ta-r~…ĺin. namańßiza s-ta-r~…ĺin a a ¶awa pińßa ¶…ôŇč tu ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ujza mapaar~…ĺ…ôs tu taŇč najaj tu ku r~…ĺipida, ¶aaj kaanub tu makajzaaj jadańßaj a kur~…ĺisiw, naji Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺisiw sapiŇčaaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu a ¶awa, zikjuz i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad zajńßan sip…ônu Ē~ ° sur~…ĺar~…ĺisan mapataj. i kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman niza pinaaj tu a bur~…ĺadan zikuz, u wawa ¶i ja-k…ô-bu pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn ku wina nu uzip pańßabaj. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ye-se-bu.Wi-sa-li-aw-now-wi-ci.S-ta-lin " kamu nu E "–ė–ĺŐĀ—Ā–ł—Ą, Low-maay, Iosif Vissarionovich Stalin, pangiha, "(…™'os ≤…™f v ≤…™s…ôr ≤…™'on…ôv ≤…™tÕ°…ē 'stal ≤…™n) , Cong-kow ta-lu nisilitan Ye-se-bu.Wi-sa-li-aw-now-wi-ci.S-ta-lin, Si-yang-kang nisulitan Ye-se-bu.Wi-sa-li-aw-now-wi-ci.S-ta-lin, 1878 a mihca 12 a bulad 18 a demiad-1953 a mihca 3 a bulad 5 a demiad", uyaan a ngangan ci Ye-se-bu.Pey-sa-li-aw-li-ni-s.ce.-Cu-cya-sen-wi-li "kamu nu Cyaw-ce-ya . niyul a sulit Ioseb Besarionis dze Jughashvili) ,ÁĺÖť¶¨ŚĆĖ:Iosif Vissarionovich Stalin,Áôľťü≥:(…™'os ≤…™f v ≤…™s…ôr ≤…™'on…ôv ≤…™tÕ°…ē 'stal ≤…™n) , ,ŤĹČŚĮę:Ioseb Besarionis dze Jughashvili) nilaculan Su-lin cen-ce a tademaw, cen-ce-li-lun-cyw, ke-min-cye, nu Su-lyen nipatucekan nu hulic tu saka tulu a kasitungus "tatengaay sa sakatusa" satalakaway nu mikeliday a tademaw, makay 1924 a mihcaan mikawaw tu cen-ce-katukh 1953 a mihcaan mapatay.nau lyen-mung-kong-can-tang "Pu-al-sen-ke" cong-yang-wiyen-huy-su-ci, Su-lin nu tatuuday wiyenhuy "zikuz sumad han panganngan Su-lyen-pu-cang-huy-l" cusi "u sipunu'ay nu cen-hu", Su-lyen-kow-bang-wiy-yen-huy-cusi, sakaytusa a bataan lasubu a mihcaanay a Su-lyen atu mutesek ku kalilid nu kitakit. . Ye-se-bu.Wi-sa-li-aw-now-wi-ci.Cu-cya-sen-wi-li lecuh i E-low-s-ti-kow a Kow-ke-li, Pahezek namicudad i Ti-bow-li-s a sen-sye-yen. mala sazikuzay nu mizatengan ni Ma-ke-s, micumud tu E-kow syakay min-cu-kung-tang, micukel ciniza tu Lye-lin a Pu-al-sen-wi-ke-pay-pye, misakaput tu 1907 a mihcaan tu Ti-bow-li-s mialaw tu gingku a kawaw sapisuped tu sakalalais a kulisiw. . 1913 a mihcaan malingatu micukaymas tu sapisulit tu ngangan "Se-ta-lin" "–°—ā–įŐĀ–Ľ–ł–Ĺ". 1917 a mihcaan E-kow 10 a bulad makazemec tu lalais, zikuz ci Pu-al-sen-wi-ke-pay-pye, S-ta-lin sakay tu pitu a tademawan nu cen-ce a tademawan a cacay. S-ta-lin I Su-lyen patizeng zikuz, mala Su-kung pulung nu misulitay tu cudad. 1913 . masakapahay a nikauzip Ye-se-bu.Wi-sa-li-aw-now-wi-ci.Cu-cya-sen-wi-li a tuas makayzaay Ti-pi-li-si capi nu ci-ci-Li-low a niyazu', u ngangasawan taneng a mikilim tu baki a wamaan Ca-ca, ayaw iluciluc kasa dayday nu A-sa-ci-A-ni kakitaan nu malukay a tubang. Ca-ca kinapina milihiza tu kalalebu, milaliw, malabades nu pisaybang atu liyaw ku liyaw a malubu, sazikuzay tahkal mulaliw tu lala' nu kakitaan, siacawa siwawa tu. . Ye-se-bu a baki ci Wa-now, lihalay sa amauzip tu nikauzipan. tatusa ku tatamaan a wawa ni Wa-now, ci Ke-aw-al-ci-atu- ci Wi-sa-li-ang "Pi-sow". ci Ke-aw-al-ci cayay ku iluc, ci Pi-sow u wama ni Ye-se-bu. Pi-sow Lecuh I 1850 a mihcaan , 1861 a mihcaan E-kow Sa hunngti ci Ya-li-san-ta 2 ase pahulak tu amin nu kasa dayda nu malukay a tubang, pasayza naayaway silala'ay a patang micakay tu adidi' a lala'. ci Ke-aw-al-ci atu ciWisa-li-ang "pye-so" salikaka i 1870 a mihcaan miales tu nu malukay a nikauzip, tayza i Ke-li mauzip. 1874 a mihcaan pye-so i cabay a luma' palabang makatineng tu Cya-mu-pa-al-su-lye a niyazu' 16 ku mihcaan ni Cay-cay " Yde-ka-cye-lin-na.Ke-aw-al-ci-ye-bu-na.Ke-la-ce". matabal mapatay ku wama ni Kay-kay. 874 a mihcaan tu sazikuzay uheni I Ke-li a kiwaki malaacawa. Ci Pye-sow kilul tu nu kusi aniciwbungan a tuud eneng sa i panan mikudepu tu kucu,ci Key-key miida tu pikuepu mibaca' pawali tu zikuz tu sapiedap tu sakauzip, sakakaay tusa a tatamaan a wawa ci Mi-ha-I atu ci Ke-aw-al-ci, nika dadawa mapatay. Ye-se-bu-lecuh I E-low-s-ti-kow Ti-pi-li sapit a kuwan satip nu Ke-li-a niyazu' "ayzaay a Cyaw-ce-ya-sen-ta.Ka-te-li-cow‚ÄĒsow-bu", saka tulu i luma'. saayaway na u kakitaan ku wama niza, yadah ku nu uzipay a kusi, nika haliepah zuma hina mitii', patay sa miti'i tu acawa u wawa. namahiza caay tu kakapah ku zaysang labu nu luma', kinapina mikilul tu wana mabulaw ciniza. 1907 a mihca 6 a bulad 26 a mihcaan, ciniza atu caculculan i Ti-pi-li-si a tuse labu nu pabinawlan misamamaw tu miadingay nu patayzaay i gingku a sakaput. i kakuwangan, sisangaan a abet mapung mapatay ku 40 a tademaw, ciniza atu caculculan miubi miala tu 25 mang a lu-pu ku kalisiw, caay pisubelid tu cacacay a kalisiwan, hamin han a pabeli tu masakaputay. nika itawya ci Mung-sen-wi-ke misakaku mikelid tu way-kaw-cye-so-tang a sakaput hinisa mialaw tu gingku tungus u la'cusay a waway, palasawad hantu tu tang ci S-ta-lin. namahiza S-ta-lin a acawa pihaceng tu ku imelang, uyza mapaales tu tang nayay tu ku lipida, caay kaanub tu makayzaay yadahay a kulisiw, nayi' ku kalisiw sapingaay tu imelang nu acawa, zikjuz i 1907 a mihca 12 a bulad zayhan sipenu' sulalisan mapatay. i kalaluman niza pinaay tu a buladan zikuz, u wawa ci Ya-ke-bu pabelien ku wina nu uzip pahabay. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
